case_title: EMERGENCY SERVICES RESTORATION, INC. VS. ANTWINETTE LEWIS et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO LILLIE MAE WASHINGTON BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-22-2012 AT 3:30 PM.
NO APPEARANCES. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY EMERGENCY SERVICES RESTORATION, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, ANTWINETTE WASHINGTON, LILLIE MAE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $62.50) SERVED JUL-24-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, ANTWINETTE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-22-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-15-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY $231.50 ON SEPTEMBER 17, 2012 AND $200.00 ON OCTOBER 9, 2012. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT PAY BOTH INSTALLMENTS, A JUDGMENT WILL ISSUE IN PLAINTFF'S FAVOR FOR $1,600.00 MINUS ANY AMOUNT PAID. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST LILLIE MAE WASHINGTON(DECEASED) IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
